visualSignatures: Neural circuit lines on dark backgrounds

psychologicalHooks.slide1_hook: Curiosity Gap + FOMO — 'Your brain is the weak link'
psychologicalHooks.slide2_agitate: Loss Aversion — Show human trading errors
psychologicalHooks.slide5_proof: Social Proof — Performance bars, live status ring
psychologicalHooks.slide6_action: Scarcity + Reciprocity — '10-day free trial, limited AI slots'

layoutRules.imageTreatment: Clipped inside hexagon or circuit frames
layoutRules.ctaStyle: Gold pill buttons with monospace text

consistencyChecklist: Every slide has a gold rule line (top or bottom)
Dark navy background (#050E1C) on all main slides
Any chart or data uses gold/blue/green color coding
All calls-to-action use gold gradient buttons
Footer or bottom strip always includes: 'ShamsGS · Dubai · MT4/MT5'
